textPlain: How do all the people involved, IRL, cope with the reputational impact of being part of such an event?  Do people change name, move, cut off ties with their past etc?  Or never tire of telling the story?
Mostly they put full blame on the trainee they put on overtime guard duty and called it a day. https://www.nrk.no/vestland/vaktsjefen-pa-_helge-ingstad_-do...
